title: Network Infrastructure & Passive Infrastructure
description: We design, implement, and maintain secure and scalable network infrastructure that keeps your business connected and future-ready.
heroDescription: We design, implement, and maintain secure and scalable network infrastructure that keeps your business connected and future-ready.
overviewDescription: Build a strong foundation for your business with reliable and high-performance network infrastructure. At Nexa Network, we design, implement, and maintain complete networking systems that ensure seamless connectivity, security, and scalability for modern enterprises.

projects.title: Enterprise Data Center Upgrade
projects.description: Complete data center cabling, rack setup and network infrastructure for high availability.

projects.title: Corporate Network Infrastructure
projects.description: Designed and implemented secure network infrastructure for a multi-location enterprise.

projects.title: Structured Cabling Deployment
projects.description: End-to-end structured cabling solution for a large commercial complex.

faqs.question: What is the difference between active and passive infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Passive infrastructure includes non-electronic components like structured cabling, server racks, and patch panels that provide the foundation. Active infrastructure includes electronic devices like switches, routers, and firewalls that actively direct network traffic.

faqs.question: How long does a typical network infrastructure project take?
faqs.answer: The timeline varies depending on the scale and complexity of the project. A small office setup might take a few weeks, while an enterprise-level data center deployment could span several months. We provide a detailed timeline during the planning phase.

faqs.question: Do you provide ongoing support and maintenance?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer comprehensive 24/7 support and maintenance contracts (SLA) to proactively monitor your network, perform necessary upgrades, and resolve issues before they impact your business.

faqs.question: Can you upgrade our existing network infrastructure?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We specialize in analyzing legacy systems and upgrading them with modern, scalable, and secure technologies without causing significant disruption to your daily operations.

title: IT Solutions & Integration Services
description: Advanced cybersecurity solutions designed to protect your systems, data, and digital assets from evolving cyber threats and sophisticated attacks.
heroDescription: Advanced cybersecurity solutions designed to protect your systems, data, and digital assets from evolving cyber threats and sophisticated attacks.
overviewDescription: Protect your enterprise with military-grade encryption, zero-trust frameworks, and continuous threat monitoring. We integrate seamlessly with your existing IT stack to provide robust defense without hindering productivity.

projects.title: Multi-Site Firewall Deployment
projects.description: Unified threat management deployment across 12 branch offices.

projects.title: Hospital Data Protection
projects.description: Secured patient data with end-to-end encryption and compliance auditing.

faqs.question: What is a zero-trust architecture?
faqs.answer: Zero Trust is a security framework requiring all users, whether in or outside the organization's network, to be authenticated, authorized, and continuously validated before being granted or keeping access to applications and data.

faqs.question: How do you handle a cyber attack?
faqs.answer: Our 24/7 SOC immediately isolates the affected systems, neutralizes the threat, and restores data from secure backups while providing a detailed post-incident forensic report.

faqs.answer: Yes, modern cloud platforms like Azure and AWS invest billions in security. We configure robust access controls, encryption, and monitoring to ensure your cloud environment is highly secure.

faqs.question: How long does a cloud migration take?
faqs.answer: A migration can take anywhere from a few weeks to several months, depending on the complexity and volume of your data and applications.

title: Secure Backup Servers & Disaster Recovery
description: Protect your critical business data with secure backup solutions, ensuring absolute business continuity and lightning-fast disaster recovery.
heroDescription: Protect your critical business data with secure backup solutions, ensuring absolute business continuity and lightning-fast disaster recovery.
overviewDescription: Your data is your most valuable asset. Nexa Network designs, installs, and manages highly secure on-premise and cloud-based backup servers that shield your organization from data loss due to hardware failure, cyberattacks, or natural disasters.

projects.title: Enterprise Recovery Solution
projects.description: Deployed a hybrid backup system for an retail network, guaranteeing recovery in under 15 minutes.

faqs.question: How often are backups performed?
faqs.answer: Backups can be scheduled continuously, hourly, daily, or weekly depending on your recovery point objectives (RPO) and business requirements.

faqs.question: What is the difference between RTO and RPO?
faqs.answer: RTO (Recovery Time Objective) is the maximum acceptable duration of downtime. RPO (Recovery Point Objective) is the maximum age of data that can be lost after recovery. We design systems to minimize both.
